## Summary / 摘要

<!-- What changed and why? / 修改了什么，为什么？ -->

## Verification / 验证

<!-- Commands, mocked scenarios, and screenshots where useful. / 命令、Mock 场景，必要时附截图。 -->

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] `deno task check`, `deno task test`, and `deno task build` pass.
- [ ] `deno task check`、`deno task test`、`deno task build` 均通过。
- [ ] No API key, Authorization header, private prompt/media, or full upstream
      media URL is included.
- [ ] 未包含 API Key、Authorization、私人提示词/媒体或完整上游媒体 URL。
- [ ] Public behavior changes update OpenAPI and both compatibility documents.
- [ ] 公开行为变化已同步 OpenAPI 与中英文兼容文档。
- [ ] Milestone status is changed only when its acceptance evidence exists.
- [ ] 仅在已有验收证据时更新里程碑状态。
